calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-22-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hong Chew, in person, for Emily Xueyan Huang, in person, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking counsel if his client would prefer to be appointed as Administrator with full IAEA authority with a full bond or, with limited IAEA authority with no bond. Counsel advises that his client prefers to be appointed with limited authority and no bond as there are no plans to sell the real property. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Emily Xueyan Huang, is appointed Administrator of the Estate with limited authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Status on Close of Estate is set for August 16, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is advised that the court has copies of the Letters of Administration in its possession and that he will need to submit an original copy of the Letters to the court for proper filing.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Andam. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Aug-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
